beer.beer_description:
Rich. Smooth. Decadent. 
Beyond Reasonable Stout is a Nitro White Imperial Stout packed with cold-brewed coffee, cacao nibs, vanilla beans, and lactose.

user.bio: Drinky drinky, time for less thinky.

items.checkin_comment: Smooth, creamy with a nice boozy punchZ solid nitro with the light carbonation and slightly syrupy mouthfeel. White chocolate, cacao and a touch of of milk and vanilla. Smooth AF.

user.bio: I'm still drinking beer, so fuck you, cancer!

items.badge_description: At a new place and don't want to choose a pint of something you may not like? Grab a few tasters! Enjoy some small pours and then decide which to upgrade to a full pour. That's 235 checkins with the serving style of Taster. Try 5 more for Level 48! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

items.badge_name: Beyond a Shadow of a Stout (Level 12)
items.badge_description: We all love Stouts, and now we have a dedicated badge to celebrate your dedication to these dark, top-fermented beer in multiple variations, like Oatmeal, Milk and more! Which one will you start with? That's 60 different beers with the style of Stout. Try 5 more for Level 13!

When a single isn’t enough, make it a double. Doubling the hops and malts in a recipe results in a higher ABV and can pack quite a boozey punch. That's 70 different beers with the style that contains Imperial / Double in its style name. Try 5 more for Level 15!
